title: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
author: Motley Fool Transcribing
description: Ameris Bancorp reported record full-year 2025 earnings of $412.2 million with diluted EPS of $6.00, representing 15% year-over-year growth. The bank achieved a 50% efficiency ratio, expanded net interest margin to 3.79%, and grew tangible book value by 14.5%. Q4 loan production reached $2.4 billion (highest since 2022), though net loan growth was tempered by elevated CRE payoffs exceeding $500 million. Management expects mid-single-digit loan and deposit growth in 2026 with potential margin compression of 5-10 basis points due to rising deposit costs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Record full-year profitability with 15% EPS growth, improved efficiency ratio from 53.2% to 50%, strong margin expansion, robust loan production at highest levels since 2022, healthy capital ratios, and consistent tangible book value growth of 14.5%. Management maintains bullish outlook for 2026 with strong pipelines and organic growth strategies, though some margin compression is anticipated.

title: AMERIS BANCORP ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Ameris Bancorp, the parent company of Ameris Bank, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share, payable on October 7, 2024, to shareholders of record as of September 30, 2024.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has announced a quarterly dividend, which is generally seen as a positive sign for shareholders.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) Stock?
author: Zacks Equity Research

title: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2024, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.77% and 3.28%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
